calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT /Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tony Stavjanik, Esq. 650-691-2888 Leonidou & Rosin for Plaintiff.
Andrew Dosa, Esq. 510-865-1600 for Defendant.

ARGUED. Plaintiff contests tentative ruling which was posted late. Mr. Stavjanik announces he is happy with the court's tentative ruling. Mr. Dosa presents arguments and requests a short continuance to present evidence. The Court shares its comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF BAY AREA LIGHTWORKS, INC.'s MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT /Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Attachment.

Plaintiff Bay Area Lightworks, Inc.'s Motion for Writ of Attachment and Application For Right To Attach Order is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

The court finds Plaintiff has made the showing required by Code of Civil Procedure section 484.090(a). The court finds a writ of attachment should issue under Code of Civil Procedure section 483.010.

Defendant McKee failed to demonstrate a right of exemption as to any asset subject to the attachment writ/order.

Plaintiff has a right to attach property of Defendant McKee & Company Electric, Inc. in the amount of $328,348.82, which includes $266,149.94 in principal owed under the construction subcontract and $62,198.88 in interest.

An undertaking of $20,000 is required before a writ shall issue.

The request for a temporary restraining order is denied. Plaintiff has not made a sufficient showing to support such an order granting the requested relief at this time. In any event, the record as a whole does not demonstrate the balance of hardships favors Plaintiff or that the requested TRO is appropriate at this time.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT /Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF BAY AREA LIGHTWORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT /Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Attachment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of its writ-related filings in compliance with Local Rule 2.7B. Defendant's Opposition was late filed; defendant corporate president unavailable due to illness and unable to participate in assisting attorney respond to writ. Matter is continued to January 27, 2025, for moving party to provide courtesy copies and for court to consider the opposition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/MEW)
